NudgeFeedCache.title: Gorgeous Things Summer Briefing
NudgeFeedCache.description: A short overview of the newest ecosystem changes.

content.markdown:
# Gorgeous Things Summer Briefing

New improvements are available across the ecosystem.

- New plugin and General System update notifications
- Contextual documentation in the Editor Help menu

NudgeFeedCache.title: Gorgeous Core 1.1.0 is ready
NudgeFeedCache.description: An update is available for the installed Gorgeous Core plugin.
